name: Documentum, Inc.
description: Documentum, Inc. was a leading provider of enterprise content management (ECM) software, helping organizations manage, share, and distribute unstructured business information such as documents, web content, and rich media. Founded in 1990, the company pioneered document management solutions before being acquired by EMC Corporation in 2003. Today, the Documentum platform is owned and developed by OpenText, continuing to serve as a robust enterprise information management solution globally.
